# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

ServiceEntry:
  apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
  kind: ServiceEntry
  metadata:
    name: third-party-api
  spec:
    hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
    location: MESH_EXTERNAL
    ports:
    - number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
    resolution: DNS

---

ServiceEntry:
  apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
  kind: ServiceEntry
  metadata:
    name: external-database
  spec:
    hosts:
    - db.external.com
    location: MESH_EXTERNAL
    ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp
      protocol: TCP
    resolution: DNS

---

VirtualService:
  apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
  kind: VirtualService
  metadata:
    name: route-third-party-api
  spec:
    hosts:
    - api.thirdparty.com
    gateways:
    - mesh
    http:
    - route:
      - destination:
          host: api.thirdparty.com
          port:
            number: 443

---

VirtualService:
  apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
  kind: VirtualService
  metadata:
    name: route-external-database
  spec:
    hosts:
    - db.external.com
    tcp:
    - route:
      - destination:
          host: db.external.com
          port:
            number: 5432
